items.final_wording: Specifies office, repeated home, and ambulatory blood-pressure assessment and hypertension staging.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Hypertension – 27
source.population: Adults with suspected or established hypertension.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth hypertension assessment and follow-up; partial for a general setting-agnostic follow-up workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies office, repeated home, and ambulatory blood-pressure assessment and hypertension staging.

items.rationale: Supports blood-pressure assessment for hypertension and kidney-risk review; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Lists follow-up electrolytes, renal function, lipids, urine ACR, glucose or HbA1c, liver tests, blood count, and ECG according to medication and result context.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Hypertension – 27
source.population: Adults with suspected or established hypertension.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth hypertension assessment and follow-up; partial for a general setting-agnostic follow-up workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists follow-up electrolytes, renal function, lipids, urine ACR, glucose or HbA1c, liver tests, blood count, and ECG according to medication and result context.

items.rationale: Supports renal function, electrolytes and urine ACR review for hypertension and kidney-risk review; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports clinician-led cardiovascular-risk discussion and review of urine, blood, retinal, and ECG assessments where actually performed or already ordered.

source.title: Hypertension in adults: diagnosis and management
source.population: Adults undergoing blood-pressure measurement, hypertension assessment, or monitoring, including adults with type 2 diabetes where specified.
source.setting: Primary care, outpatient review, home or ambulatory monitoring, and specialist referral pathways.
source.exclusions: Exact for blood-pressure device technique, clinic measurement, ABPM and HBPM result review, cardiovascular-risk context, monitoring, annual review, and documented high-risk features. Diagnostic conclusions, targets, treatment, medicines, and referrals are not generated or mapped. The postural-hypotension section additionally supports clinician-entered orthostatic blood-pressure documentation without automatic diagnosis or management. items.rationale: Supports cardiovascular-risk and target-organ assessment for hypertension and kidney-risk review; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports clinician-arranged GFR and albuminuria monitoring and evaluation of a greater-than-20-percent eGFR change or ACR doubling without mapping fixed legacy intervals.

source.title: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of Chronic Kidney Disease
source.population: Adults and children at risk of or living with CKD, with age, cause, GFR, albuminuria, progression, treatment, and referral qualifiers.
source.setting: CKD detection, evaluation, monitoring, medication stewardship, referral, and longitudinal kidney care.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected CKD, GFR, albuminuria, medication-review, and referral documentation. Diagnosis, treatment, medicine changes or doses, fixed monitoring intervals beyond stated qualifiers, and UAE service pathways remain clinician responsibilities.

exact_location.heading: Monitoring GFR and albuminuria in CKD
exact_location.locator: Practice Points 2.1.1–2.1.5; summary PDF pages 40 and 81–82

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician-arranged GFR and albuminuria monitoring and evaluation of a greater-than-20-percent eGFR change or ACR doubling without mapping fixed legacy intervals.

items.rationale: Supports GFR and albuminuria monitoring in CKD for hypertension and kidney-risk review; no decision is generated.
